scenarios.name: Panel loads the Gemini web app on first show

steps.text: the user presses the global hotkey "LeftShift+RightCommand+]"
the panel content URL is "https://gemini.google.com/app"

scenarios.name: User can complete Google sign-in inside the panel

steps.text: the panel is visible
the user is not signed in to Google
the user completes Google sign-in inside the panel
the user is signed in to Google inside the panel

scenarios.name: Google authentication popup opens inside the app

steps.text: the panel is visible
the user has initiated Google sign-in
Google authentication requires a secondary window
the secondary window opens inside the app
the user can complete sign-in without switching to an external browser

scenarios.name: Hiding and showing the panel does not reload the web view

steps.text: the user presses the global hotkey "LeftShift+RightCommand+]"
the user presses the global hotkey "LeftShift+RightCommand+]"
the user presses the global hotkey "LeftShift+RightCommand+]"
the web view navigation count is "1"

scenarios.name: Google session persists after the app is restarted

steps.text: the user is signed in to Google inside the panel
the user quits the app
the user launches the app
the user presses the global hotkey "LeftShift+RightCommand+]"
the user is signed in to Google inside the panel

scenarios.name: Panel shows an error message when the network is unavailable

steps.text: the network is unavailable
the user presses the global hotkey "LeftShift+RightCommand+]"
the panel displays "No network connection — check your internet and try again"
